name.text: Finding the area of a given octagon floor tile

questiontext.text:
A regular octagon-shaped floor tile has a side length of \({@s@}\) cm and an apothem (the perpendicular distance from the centre to a side) of \({@a@}\) cm.

[[jsxgraph width="400px" height="400px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, { boundingbox: [-8, 8, 8, -8], axis: false, showNavigation: false, showCopyright: false }); var n = 8; var R = 6; /* Vertices - slightly rotated for optimal label placement */ var points = []; for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) { var angle = (2 * Math.PI * i / n) + (Math.PI / 8); points.push(board.create('point', [ R * Math.cos(angle), R * Math.sin(angle) ], {visible: false})); } /* Octagon (Green Polygon) */ board.create('polygon', points, { fillColor: 'none', borders: {strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: '#2e7d32'} }); /* Center Point (Black Dot) - Label 'o' removed */ var O = board.create('point', [0, 0], {color: 'black', size: 4, withLabel: false}); var pA = points[0]; var pB = points[1]; var M_apo = board.create('midpoint', [pA, pB], {visible: false}); /* Apothem (Dashed Red Line) */ board.create('segment', [O, M_apo], { dash: 2, strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: 'red' }); /* 1. Rotated Apothem Label (Float value, e.g., '4.8 cm') */ board.create('text', [ (O.X() + M_apo.X()) / 2 - 0.6, // Offset slightly to the right of the line (O.Y() + M_apo.Y()) / 2 + 0.3, // Offset slightly above the line "{#a#} cm" ], { fontSize: 14, color: 'red', anchorX: 'left', rotate: function() { /* Calculate the angle of the apothem segment */ var angle_apo = Math.atan2(M_apo.Y() - O.Y(), M_apo.X() - O.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; /* Ensure text doesn't appear upside down */ return (angle_apo > 90 || angle_apo < -90) ? angle_apo + 180 : angle_apo; } }); /* 2. Side Label (Blue segment) */ var segSide = board.create('segment', [pA, pB], { strokeColor: 'blue', strokeWidth: 3 }); /* Calculate angle and position for the side label */ board.create('text', [ M_apo.X() + 0.5, M_apo.Y() + 0.5, "{#s#} cm" ], { color: 'blue', fontSize: 14, anchorX: 'left', rotate: function() { var ang_side = Math.atan2(pB.Y() - pA.Y(), pB.X() - pA.X()) * 180 / Math.PI; return (ang_side > 90 || ang_side < -90) ? ang_side + 180 : ang_side; } }); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the total area of the octagon floor tile.

Area = [[input:ans1]] cm2 [[validation:ans1]][[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

A regular octagon can be split into 8 identical triangles. Each triangle has a base (the side of the octagon) and a height (the apothem).

Step 1: Calculate the area of one triangle

Using the formula \(\text{Area} = \frac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}\):

\[ \text{Area of one triangle} = \frac{1}{2} \times {@s@} \times {@a@} \] \[ \text{Area of one triangle} = {@area_tri@} \text{ cm}^2 \]

Step 2: Calculate the total area of the octagon

Since the octagon is made of 8 such triangles:

\[ \text{Total Area} = 8 \times \text{Area of one triangle} \] \[ \text{Total Area} = 8 \times {@area_tri@} \] \[ \text{Total Area} = {@ta@} \text{ cm}^2 \]

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
